title: paspalum trichophyllum
intro: Paspalum trichophyllum, also known as Papyrus grass, is a type of tropical grass found in Central and South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Paspalum trichophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Paspalum trichophyllum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
